segments.persona: Tech company CTOs and engineering leaders
segments.demographics: 40-55, senior technical roles, mid-to-large tech companies

segments.persona: Tech company hiring managers focused on AI talent acquisition

segments.rationale: Web research shows that hiring managers in tech companies are key decision-makers for AI-focused talent programs; they are often aligned with CTOs but focus more on hiring strategy
